expectations.text: COMPANY.md exists at the sandbox root and contains an ownership map table with columns for Concern, Owner, and Notes
expectations.evidence: COMPANY.md exists but has no ownership map table with Concern/Owner/Notes columns. The only table is a Team table with columns Agent/Role/Primary outputs.

expectations.text: COMPANY.md contains a conflict resolution table addressing boundary edges between agents
expectations.evidence: No conflict resolution table present. Only a plain ASCII flow diagram and a short Guardrails list.

expectations.text: Each agent has a file at .claude/agents/{lowercase_name}.md with YAML frontmatter (name, description, tools, model, memory)
expectations.evidence: Files are at agents/ (sandbox-path substitution acceptable). However, frontmatter has only name/description/tools — no model and no memory fields. Verified in client-outreach.md and invoicing-finance.md.

expectations.text: Each subagent frontmatter includes memory: project
expectations.evidence: No memory field in any agent frontmatter.

expectations.text: Each subagent frontmatter description reads as a routing trigger — specifies when to invoke and when not to
expectations.evidence: Descriptions specify when to invoke (e.g. 'Use for acquiring and nurturing studio clients…') but none specify when NOT to invoke.

expectations.text: Each subagent body contains 6 sections: Identity, Voice, Analytical Frameworks, Boundaries, Failure Modes, Standing Instructions
expectations.evidence: Bodies use sections Mission/Responsibilities/Voice/Guardrails/Output format/Handoffs. No Identity, Analytical Frameworks, Boundaries, Failure Modes, or Standing Instructions sections.

expectations.text: Each subagent's Boundaries section includes Owns, Does not own, and Hands off to subsections
expectations.evidence: No Boundaries section exists. Handoffs section exists in some agents but no Owns/Does not own structure.

expectations.text: No two agents claim ownership of the same concern in the ownership map
expectations.evidence: No ownership map exists in COMPANY.md. Vacuously un-satisfiable — the artefact being checked is missing.

expectations.text: No agent-company/ folder is created in the sandbox
expectations.evidence: Only COMPANY.md and agents/ present in outputs — no agent-company/ directory.

expectations.text: No web development, design, or technical coding agent is created — the user explicitly said non-technical
expectations.evidence: Four agents: client-outreach, social-media, invoicing-finance, project-manager. All business-ops, no technical agents.

expectations.text: Agent analytical frameworks reference practical creative-industry or small-business methods, not generic corporate strategies
expectations.evidence: No Analytical Frameworks sections exist in any agent file. Cannot pass.

expectations.text: The transcript shows evidence of running a quality gate checklist before final delivery
expectations.evidence: No transcript file in outputs dir. No quality gate checklist visible in COMPANY.md or agent files.

expectations.text: Each subagent Voice section includes at least 2 example sentences with specific, realistic content relevant to a music production studio
expectations.evidence: Voice sections exist but describe tone in abstract ('Warm, direct, musician-to-musician. No corporate filler.') with no example sentences.

expectations.text: Each subagent Analytical Frameworks section includes at least 2 named domain-specific frameworks with concrete criteria
expectations.evidence: No Analytical Frameworks section in any agent.

expectations.text: Each subagent Failure Modes section contains at least 3 role-specific failure modes (not generic advice)
expectations.evidence: No Failure Modes section. Only short Guardrails lists with 2-3 bullets of generic warnings.

expectations.text: Each subagent Standing Instructions includes an instruction about verifying claims against current sources with URL citation
expectations.evidence: No Standing Instructions section in any agent.

expectations.text: Each subagent Failure Modes includes a failure mode about relying on training data instead of researching current sources
expectations.evidence: No Failure Modes section; no mention of training-data staleness anywhere.

expectations.text: Each subagent Standing Instructions mentions consulting persistent memory at session start and saving learnings after significant tasks
expectations.evidence: No Standing Instructions and no mention of persistent memory in any agent file.

expectations.text: Each subagent Standing Instructions references COMPANY.md at the project root for conflict resolution
expectations.evidence: No Standing Instructions. Agent files do not reference COMPANY.md at all.

expectations.text: The ownership map in COMPANY.md is consistent with the Owns sections in each subagent file — no discrepancies
expectations.evidence: Neither the ownership map nor the Owns sections exist. Cannot be consistent when neither artefact exists.

claims.claim: Sandbox blocked .claude/ so files placed at agents/ instead
claims.evidence: COMPANY.md notes 'the .claude/ path was blocked in this sandbox'; files confirmed at agents/.

claims.claim: Four-agent business-ops team covers the user's stated scope (outreach, social, invoicing, PM)
claims.evidence: Team table in COMPANY.md maps 1:1 to the four domains requested.
Guardrails in COMPANY.md and agent files repeatedly require owner confirmation before sending.

claims.claim: Agent personas follow the v2.1 standard (Identity/Voice/Frameworks/Boundaries/Failure Modes/Standing Instructions)
claims.evidence: Structure is entirely different — Mission/Responsibilities/Voice/Guardrails/Output format/Handoffs. Without the skill, the executor produced a generic competent subagent pattern, not the framework's 6-section v2.1 shape.

needs_review: Sandbox blocked .claude/ — files need to be moved to .claude/agents/ in the real project
workarounds: Placed agent files at agents/ instead of .claude/agents/

suggestions.assertion: No agent-company/ folder is created in the sandbox
suggestions.reason: Trivially passes — a minimal correct output never creates agent-company/, so this assertion only catches confusion between two naming conventions. Consider asserting the presence of .claude/agents/ instead (which actually tests placement).
No assertion tests that the tools list in frontmatter is scoped appropriately per role (e.g. invoicing-finance should not have WebSearch if purely local).

Assertion about 'transcript shows evidence of running a quality gate checklist' can't be verified — no transcript is saved to outputs_dir. Either drop it or require a checklist artefact be written to outputs.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions strongly discriminate for v2.1 structural fidelity — without-skill run fails 18/20 cleanly, which is exactly what the eval is designed to catch. Two assertions (trivial folder check, transcript-dependent) are weaker and could be tightened.
